violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed ceiling no smooth and easily cleanable.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape on seal of chest freezer. Duct tape is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed cage around light bulb in vent hood has dirt and grease build up on wire surface.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
